modTypeDesc.performance: Optimize game settings to improve frame rate and smoothness
modTypeDesc.graphics: Enhance visual quality including textures, lighting, and resolution
modTypeDesc.translation: Provide localized text translation for the game
modTypeDesc.feature: Add new gameplay mechanics, systems, or features
modTypeDesc.ui: Improve the game interface for better usability and aesthetics
modTypeDesc.music: Replace or add background music and sound effects
modTypeDesc.skin: Change character or model appearance including outfits and styles
modTypeDesc.cheat: Modify game values or mechanics for assistance or reduced difficulty
modTypeDesc.other: Mod types not covered by current categories
